last_episode_to_air.name: Grand Finale
last_episode_to_air.overview: The queens battle for the crown in a lip sync extravaganza. Guest Judge is Monét X Change

name: Canada's Drag Race: Canada vs The World
original_name: Canada's Drag Race: Canada vs The World
overview: On Canada’s Drag Race: Canada vs The World, queens from the international Drag Race family will compete to become the ultimate Drag Race superstar! With Canada acting as host nation, this six-episode battle will bring back fan favourites and top talent from across the globe for an elite competition to crown the Queen Of The Mother-Pucking World.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: After three wildly successful seasons of Canada’s Drag Race, our queens of the north have proven they can “sleigh” in every way. Now it’s time to raise the stakes and go global! At this level of competition, there are no weak links - just nine seasoned queens with a thirst for victory. Let the international games begin!

episodes.name: Bonjour, Hi
episodes.overview: Queens from around the world descend on Canada and form girl groups to kick off the battle for the crown. Guest Judge is Anjulie.

episodes.name: Snatch Summit
episodes.overview: The queens impersonate celebrities and play the iconic Snatch Game, with a twist. Guest Judges are Sarain Fox and Priyanka.

episodes.name: The Weather Ball
episodes.overview: The queens put their design skills to the test as they present three looks in this ball challenge. Guest Judges are Hollywood Jade and Jeanne Beker.

episodes.name: Comedy Queens
episodes.overview: The queen’s comedy skills are tested as they perform a stand-up comedy routine. Guest Judge is Gary Janetti.

episodes.name: Spy Queens
episodes.overview: The queens star in the action-packed blockbuster film ‘Spy Queens’. Guest Judge is Joe Zee.

episodes.name: Grand Finale
episodes.overview: The queens battle for the crown in a lip sync extravaganza. Guest Judge is Monét X Change
